author: maxine--futura
content: Migrated from chainlink issues #763, #777, #778, #779. Context: get_schema and get_schema_type only accept 3 ref formats (atdata://local/schema/Name@version, local://schemas/module.Class@version, at://did:plc:.../ac.foundation.dataset.schema/rkey). The @handle/TypeName@version format (e.g. @foundation.ac/MnistSample@1.0.0) would mirror the @handle/dataset-name pattern in load_dataset. Implementation: detect @handle/ prefix, resolve handle to DID via atmosphere, query schema records by name+version. Key files: src/atdata/index/_schema.py (_parse_schema_ref), src/atdata/index/_index.py (get_schema/get_schema_type), src/atdata/atmosphere/__init__.py
